title: Crashers Wolves
description: The resource pack for the Crashers Wolves (Data Pack)
body:
[

![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/026201561576dffe9c021d2941061262797cee60.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/crasher120/projects)[![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e009480f2af8c79e3ea4e398338cae87e9ff8c31.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/Crasher120)[![BlueSky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f95aae0aa5dfa831a8022918c7b01becf079bbf6.png)](https://bsky.app/profile/crasher120.bsky.social)[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a7cde82586b398a24a306fc4948f278f877ae1e.png)

](https://discord.gg/RxhH3zTsjB) ![wolves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b3cf5564e8f714979ceed28c55a734ae4663aad.png) ## Crashers Wolves Resource Pack **This is the resource pack for the [Crashers Wolves data pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/crashers-wolves).**\ **To get the data pack working, you must download this resorce pack!** ![Wolves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c6959188ce5cdde5f8bee58e9c5964a1b3d105a.png) ### The Timber Wolf **Found in dark oak forests**\ **They spawn in packs of 4** ### The Prairie Wolf **Found in cherry groves**\ **They spawn in packs of 1-4** ### The Smoky Wolf **Found in birch forests**\ **They spawn in packs of 2-3** ### The Scarlet Wolf **Found in old growth birch forests**\ **They spawn in packs of 1-3**
